evals.prompt: fetch the content of https://example.com as markdown
expectations: Skill triggers correctly based on prompt keywords
Uses the CLI or SDK interface properly
Returns the expected markdown content format

evals.prompt: get me the JSON output from rawfy for this URL
expectations: Invokes tool with `--format json` flag
Output is successfully parsed as valid JSON
JSON object matches the defined output schema

evals.prompt: research this article and summarise it https://example.com/article
expectations: Rawfy is called first to fetch the content
Content is passed as context to a summarization prompt
Final output contains a coherent summary of the fetched content

evals.prompt: get all the links from this webpage https://example.com
expectations: Uses the `--links-only` flag or extracts links from JSON
Returns a flat array of URLs
No body content is output, only links

evals.prompt: use rawfy tool to fetch this page https://example.com
expectations: Identifies explicit MCP context
Invokes the `rawfy_fetch` MCP tool instead of CLI
Returns the content properly via tool response
Gracefully catches network error
Performs at least one retry attempt
Surfaces a useful error message instead of crashing

evals.prompt: this page requires JavaScript to render: https://spa-example.com
expectations: Detects JS requirement from the prompt
Appends `--js` flag to the command
Wait time is implicitly or explicitly applied

evals.prompt: fetch these 3 URLs and give me their titles
expectations: Recognizes multiple URLs in the prompt
Uses batch mode or a bash loop to fetch concurrently
Returns structured results mapping URLs to titles
